title: willdampia formosa
intro: Willdampia formosa, also known as the Queensland walnut, is a tree species native to Australia, characterized by its edible nuts and attractive foliage. The medicinal properties of Willdampia formosa include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include reducing fever, treating coughs and colds, and providing relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Willdampia formosa include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
